languages.original_text: "I will note that this is not the original architectural design. The palace has been reconstructed and upgraded several times to match the dynasty's growing status. You can find more details in the data-repository."

languages.text: "Отмечу, что это не первозданная форма архитектуры. Дворец несколько раз перестраивался и улучшался в соответствии с растущим статусом династии. Подробности вы можете найти в инфохранилище".

"I will note that this is not the original architectural design. The palace has been reconstructed and upgraded several times to match the dynasty's growing status. You can find more details in the data-repository."

"I will note that this is not the original architectural design. The palace has been reconstructed and upgraded several times to match the dynasty's growing status. You can find more details in the data-repository."

languages.text: «Quiero señalar que este no es el diseño arquitectónico original. El palacio se ha reconstruido y mejorado en varias ocasiones para reflejar los aumentos de estatus de la dinastía. Puede encontrar más detalles en el repositorio de datos».
languages.original_text: "I will note that this is not the original architectural design. The palace has been reconstructed and upgraded several times to match the dynasty's growing status. You can find more details in the data-repository."

traits.locale_text: «Quiero señalar que este no es el diseño arquitectónico original. El palacio se ha reconstruido y mejorado en varias ocasiones para reflejar los aumentos de estatus de la dinastía. Puede encontrar más detalles en el repositorio de datos».

languages.text: 「申し上げておきますと、これは元々の建築設計ではございません。宮殿は、王朝の高まりゆく地位に見合うよう、幾度も再建・改築されてまいりました。詳細はデータ保管庫でご確認いただけます」
languages.original_text: "I will note that this is not the original architectural design. The palace has been reconstructed and upgraded several times to match the dynasty's growing status. You can find more details in the data-repository."

traits.locale_text: 「申し上げておきますと、これは元々の建築設計ではございません。宮殿は、王朝の高まりゆく地位に見合うよう、幾度も再建・改築されてまいりました。詳細はデータ保管庫でご確認いただけます」

languages.text: “我必须指出，这并非建筑的最初设计。为匹配王朝日益增长的地位，这座宫殿经历了数次重建和升级。你可以在数据资料库中找到更多细节。”
languages.original_text: "I will note that this is not the original architectural design. The palace has been reconstructed and upgraded several times to match the dynasty's growing status. You can find more details in the data-repository."

traits.locale_text: “我必须指出，这并非建筑的最初设计。为匹配王朝日益增长的地位，这座宫殿经历了数次重建和升级。你可以在数据资料库中找到更多细节。”

languages.text: "Ich werde mir notieren, dass dies nicht die ursprüngliche Architektur ist. Der Palast wurde rekonstruiert und mehrere Male erweitert, um den wachsenden Status der Dynastie widerzuspiegeln. Weitere Details findet Ihr im Datenrepositorium."
languages.original_text: "I will note that this is not the original architectural design. The palace has been reconstructed and upgraded several times to match the dynasty's growing status. You can find more details in the data-repository."

traits.locale_text: "Ich werde mir notieren, dass dies nicht die ursprüngliche Architektur ist. Der Palast wurde rekonstruiert und mehrere Male erweitert, um den wachsenden Status der Dynastie widerzuspiegeln. Weitere Details findet Ihr im Datenrepositorium."

languages.text: « Je note qu'il ne s'agit pas du plan architectural d'origine. Le palais a été reconstruit et agrandi plusieurs fois afin de refléter l'ascension sociale de la dynastie. Vous trouverez davantage de détails dans le reliquaire de données. »
languages.original_text: "I will note that this is not the original architectural design. The palace has been reconstructed and upgraded several times to match the dynasty's growing status. You can find more details in the data-repository."

languages.text: "Bunun orijinal mimari tasarım olmadığını belirtmeliyim. Saray, hanedanın artan statüsüne uyması için birkaç kez yeniden inşa edildi ve yenilendi. Veri bankasında daha fazla ayrıntı bulabilirsiniz."
